en.extract:
The streaky-breasted flufftail (Sarothrura boehmi) is a species of bird in the family Sarothruridae.
It is sparsely spread across wet grasslands of central Africa.
The name of this bird commemorates the German zoologist Richard Böhm.
Its nests are constructed of grass-stems and blades, and placed on the ground.

The '''streaky-breasted flufftail''' ('''''Sarothrura boehmi''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Sarothruridae]].

It is sparsely spread across wet grasslands of central Africa.

The name of this bird commemorates the German zoologist [[Richard Böhm]].

Its nests are constructed of grass-stems and blades, and placed on the ground.<ref>{{Citation |title=Burhinus capensis (Lichtenstein). Spotted Thick-knee; Spotted Dikkop. Oedicnème du tachard. |url=http://dx.doi.org/10.5040/9781472926999.0119 |work=The Birds of Africa |access-date=2023-08-27 |publisher=Academic Press Limited}}</ref>
